name: writhing_stalker.live_alley_predator_mcw
description: Live alley-predator row: vulnerable midnight scene records cover-shadow approach, plausible strike, cooldown, and re-engagement/no-spam evidence.

steps.label: post_load_alley_predator_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: vulnerable-midnight saved-active-stalker fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_before_alley_predator
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected time before live writhing-stalker window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local midnight before alley predator window

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_before_alley_predator
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live-scenario footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile stalker starts eight tiles east with cover-route opportunity

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_alley_predator
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_alley_predator_repeated_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: long bounded live turn window records stalking, strike, cooldown, and possible re-engagement

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_alley_predator_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked shadow/strike/cooldown alley-predator lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves cover-shadow, plausible strike, and cooldown breath

evidence_contract.claim: cover/edge stalking produces plausible strike cadence with cooldown/reposition instead of open beeline or spam
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live fun behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: these scenarios prove bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
